All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
ConsumableItem
Represents a restorative item type that can be consumed by a player character.
DestructibleTile
Represents a tile within the dungeon layout that can be broken or collected.
Dungeon
Represents a multi-floor dungeon layout within the game world.
EnemyChar
Represents a hostile NPC entity within the dungeon grid.
Floor
Represents a single layer or floor layout within the dungeon.
Game
Serves as the main orchestrator for "Yohane The Parhelion! The Siren in the Mirror World!".
GameCharacter
Represents an active character entity in the Mirror World of Numazu.
Item
Represents the base blueprint for all inventory items within the game.
NPChar
Represents a non-playable character (NPC) in the game world.
PlayableChar
Represents a user-controlled character within the game.
Tile
Represents a fundamental structural unit or coordinate node within the dungeon grid map.
